creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

Looks like a victim of the freetype2/XFree86 vs. freetype2/port mess. 
I planned on looking at this post GNOME 1.4 so I'll use this one 
as a convenient reminder.  BTW, nautilus doesn't do anything useful 
under FreeBSD yet, so it's no great loss.
